compresso.option.avif_speed.description: How fast to encode AVIF. Faster makes larger files; slower makes smaller, better-looking ones.
compresso.option.format.description: Image format to save screenshots in.
compresso.option.match_window.descriptio: Save screenshots at your window's size. On scaled (HiDPI) displays this avoids oversized files.
compresso.option.mode.description: Lossless keeps every pixel exact. Lossy makes smaller files by dropping some detail.
compresso.option.png_level.description: How hard to work to shrink PNG files. Higher saves more space but takes a little longer.
compresso.option.prefer_external.descrip: When a system encoder can handle the format, use it instead of the built-in one.
compresso.option.quality.description: Quality for lossy formats: lower is smaller, higher looks better.
compresso.option.use_external.descriptio: Use extra image encoders installed on your system for better compression, when available.
compresso.option.webp_method.description: How hard to work to shrink WebP files. Higher saves more space but takes longer.
